blockers: no independent non-Line9-conditioned simulation family is approved for training
observations: The formal line split is locked in configs/paper_splits_v15_aeropath.json.
Line7 retains measured flight heights above the planned 20 m range with an explicit QC flag.
Canonical arrays remain in acquisition order; engineering-profile reversal is display-only.
FORMAL06C is accepted only as Line9-conditioned development evidence.
FORMAL07A was rejected by strict common-trace blind review for an over-stratified background.
FORMAL07B passed controlled one-trace causal and distributed32 morphology review but remains Line9-conditioned development evidence.
Independent IV2 Family 01 passed static, geometry, one-trace causal, distributed8 causal, and distributed32 full-scene morphology pilot gates.
IV2 Family 01 remains non-trainable until complete native-256 required runs, release packaging, and independent human approval are complete.
IV2 Family 02 transferred the FORMAL06C source and weak-interface mechanism onto regenerated Family 01 geometry and recovered the accepted seven-lobe 79 MHz morphology.
IV2 Family 02 remains development-only because the mechanism-selection decision used Line9 diagnostics; its exact matched negative inherits the same family-level restriction.
IV2 Family 03 re-originated the source from project-wide hardware bandwidth evidence and passed static, one-trace causal, exact-negative, and distributed32 morphology gates.

IV2 Family 03 remains non-trainable: its 100 MHz zero-phase band proxy produced a sharper 116 MHz-centroid packet than the accepted development morphology, and native-256 causal and human release gates remain incomplete.

FORMAL08A directly locked FORMAL06C physics and changed only depth-tapered continuous middle-cover texture; runtime passed but blind full-span review found insufficient visual gain, so it remains an ablation rather than a successor.

FORMAL08B directly locked FORMAL06C physics and strengthened only transition-following continuous deep-cover texture; 8 and full-span 32 full-scene runs passed execution, but blind review found no useful background gain and target dominance increased, so the case was not promoted.
